name: Yoshiki Kishinuma
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5' 8") Giving off the aura of a delinquent, Yoshiki faced difficulty in school due to issues at home. At one point, Yoshiki considered getting himself expelled from Kisaragi Academy since he could not find a reason to continue attending if he had no interest. However, Ayumi changed Yoshiki's mind on the matter after standing up for him against their PE teacher Mikio Tsubota. name: Yuu Kashima
description: __Height:__ 178 cm 2nd one to transfer to Mori High. Joined the photography club for photos but it had nothing to do with photography. Good at studying, grew up in a big family.

name: Akira Kunimi
description: __Team:__ Aobajōsai (former Kitagawa Daīchi) (first year at Aoba Johsai) __Height:__ 182.8 cm __Number:__ 13 __Position:__ Wing Spiker He is a quiet and indifferent person, though it's mostly out of laziness. name: Aoshi Shinomori
description: Shinomori Aoshi was raised a ninja of the Oniwabanshū, who worked for the Shogunate government during the Edo period. He helped to raise Makimachi Misao from childhood as a member of the Oniwabanshū. After the revolution, since a few members of the Oniwabanshū were unable to adapt to life in the Meiji era, Aoshi and these members worked for the corrupt, power-hungry business man, Takeda Kanryū instead. name: Hakuya Mitsumine
description: Hakuya is Kobeni Yonomori's fiancé who suddenly appears on her 16th birthday with his little sister Mashiro Mitsumine. He and his sister start living in the same house as Kobeni and her own sister, Benio Yonomori.

name: Hanon Houshou
description: Hanon is the Mermaid Princess of the South Atlantic Ocean, and the keeper of the Aqua Pearl. She has three different forms (Mermaid Hanon, human form, and her singer form Aqua Pearl Voice), and two image songs (Ever Blue and Mizuiro no Senritsu). She is the second mermaid to appear in the first season and becomes best friends with Lucia. name: Judah
description: Judah (ユダ, Yuda) is one of the main characters of Fire Punch. She had an overwhelmingly powerful blessing of regeneration.

name: Kabuto Hanadori
description: A second-year student with a severe case of eighth-grade syndrome, giving him delusions of grandeur and making him believe he lives in a fantasy world. Though usually cheerful, he has a hard time dealing with negative situations and often gets sad or even starts crying if something bad happens.

name: Kama
description: Assassin's True Name is Kama, also called Kamadeva, God of Love of Indian mythology. Normally a male deity, he has manifested as a female Pseudo-Servant in the body of Sakura Matou, likely related to her "special characteristic" and another goddess who is also a Pseudo-Servant.

name: Kaoru Kanzaki
description: __Height:__ 171 cm He has been able to see spirits since he was a child, and has suffered many misfortunes due to the nature of ghosts that possess him once he learns that he can see. In order to create an atmosphere that makes it difficult for spirits to approach, he intentionally dyes his hair to give him a frivolous appearance. He is an otaku, and his bible in life is "SLAM DUNK".

name: Keiji Shinogi
description: __Height:__ 185.5 cm (6'1") A participant in the death game, a police detective. Keiji is shown to be pretty laid-back and level-headed during the Death Game, though he comes off as shady to some of the participants. He usually refers to himself as "the friendly policeman" in an effort to establish himself as trustworthy, and makes a pretense of being less cunning than he really is. He's observant, canny, and is quite good at reading other people. He has good instincts regarding when to speak up

name: Kurumi Nanase
description: **Height:** 151 cm (4'11'') Twin of Konomi and older sister to Taichi. A very loving and caring teenager, but is mentally unstable. This is why she goes by Menhera-chan. Menhera (メンヘラ) meaning "people who have mental problems." She has no bad intent meant in her actions but will go to extremes at times in an attempt to get what she wants. name: Lili Ichijoin
description: A talented oil painter and the daughter of kimono makers from Yokohama, Japan. Her mother has given her six months to become the top student at Saint Thomas Art Academy, or else face abandoning her artistic ambitions permanently.

name: Mana Nagase
description: **Height:** 158 cm (5'2") Mana Nagase is a solo idol under Hoshimi Production. She is the older sister of [Kotono Nagase](https://anilist.co/character/153565/) and her image color is pink. She grew up in Hoshimi City and attended both Hoshimi Middle School and Hoshimi Private High School. She became an idol during her time as a high school student and performed at the school festivals while being a student. Mana is an idol who makes everyone around her smile just by being there. Despite her mixed German heritage, Mei's reserved demeanor and appearance often lead her to spend time alone, keeping her distance from others. name: Miles
description: One of the higher ranking soldiers at Briggs' Fortress under Olivier Mira Armstrong. As he is partly Ishvalian, Armstrong was ordered to imprison him during the Ishvalian war, but she refused to do such a thing only because of his ethnicity. Miles is very loyal to Armstrong, and wants to stay in the military to change their perspective on Ishvalians.

name: Natsumi Tsujimoto
description: __Height:__ 163cm Natsumi is an officer stationed at the fictional Bokuto Station in Tokyo's Sumida Ward. She is very outgoing as well as very laid back. She often demonstrates superhuman strength second only to Shoji Tokairin and is a motorcycle enthusiast, capable of high-risk maneuvers on both bikes and mopeds. description: Nobita is a fourth grader in Tokyo and only child. He is lazy, bad in sports, bad in school, plain as a gray rock, and to top it off, all too unlucky in his (mis)adventures with Doraemon. However, his struggles to overcome his flaws are what drive the storyline.

name: Saori Takebe
description: **Height:** 157 cm (5'2") **Home Town:** Ooarai, Ibaraki Prefecture Hana's friend and the other girl who befriended Miho during the first day of school. She is a social butterfly and is incredibly talkative. She yearns for a love that will love everything in the world, despite never being in a relationship before. name: Shoutarou Futaba
description: A new member of the Ao High School Rhythmic Gymnastics Club. He is a first year high school student. Born in Miyagi. In the summer of the third year of junior high school, he was fascinated by rhythmic gymnastics when he happened to see the performance of the Ao High School Men's Rhythmic Gymnastics Club. He enrolls in Ao High School and jumps into the world of rhythmic gymnastics, but although he is an amateur, he will grow rapidly with his straightforward personality.
